titleStmt.title: SII 8.244: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 244. (A.R. No. 639-A of 1902). ON THE SAME WALLS.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulacekaratevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 2vatu Irupattiraṇṭāvatu siṁhanā yaṟṟu Aparapakṣa ttu trayodaśi yum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirattu nāḷ pāṇṭikulācaṉivaḷanāṭṭu Āṟkāṭṭuk kūṟṟattuc ciṟṟāṟkāṭṭu kiḻāṉ Araiyaṉ maṉṟuḷāṭumperumāḷ kulacekara vāṇātarāyaṉeṉ kulottuṅkacoḻavaḷanāṭṭuk kīḻkūṟṟu Amparnāṭṭuk koṟṟavācalil tillaināyakaṉ toṇṭaimāṉ Uṭaiyāṉ puvaṉekavira vakaḷaṅkanāṭāḻvāṟku vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭut
ta paricāvatu . Uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭuk kiḻkkūṟṟu Amparnāṭṭu Eṇṇukuṭi yil Eṉ kāṇiyāy viṟṟa nattattil Aṇṭakkuṭaiyāṉ maṉaiirup peṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa maṉaikku melpāṟkellai neṭuvāyaluṭaiyār maṉaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Eṉpakkal koḷkiṉṟār koṇṭa maṇṇiṭṭukkum viḷainilattukkum teṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai nāyiṉār tirumikaiccūruṭaiyār tevatāṉa maṉaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai teruvukku vaṭakkum Innāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa mikutikkuṟai vuṭpaṭa maṉai kuḻi 100 Ikkuḻi nūṟum Uyyakkoṇṭār ma
ṉaiyirup peṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa maṉaikku melpāṟkellai neṭuvāyaluṭaiyār maṉaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai meṟpaṭiyār maṇṇiṭṭukkum viḷainilattukkum teṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai nāyiṉār tirumikaiccūruṭaiyār tevatāṉa maṇṇiṭṭukkum viḷainilattukkum meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai teruvukku vaṭakkum Innāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa mikutikkuṟaivuṭpaṭa maṉai kuḻi 100 Ikkuḻi nūṟum teṟkiṟciṟakil tirumañcaṉamaḻakiyāṉ maṉaiyirup peṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa maṉaikkumelpāṟkellai Uṭaiyār tirumicaiccūruṭaiyār
tevatāṉamaṉaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai teruvukkut teṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai viṭaṅkāṇṭār maṉaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Uṭaiyār tirumikaiccūruṭaiyār tirunāmattukkāṇi viḷainilattukku vaṭakkum Innāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa mikutikkuṟai vuṭpaṭa maṉai kuḻi 100 5 10- l meṟkaṭaiyat tiru- [ mulasth] Āṉamuṭaiyār tevatāṉa maṉai kuḻi 10 2 nikki kuḻi 13 10 8 Ikkuḻi nūṟṟu muppatteṭṭum Amparnāṭṭukkoṉār maṉai yeṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa maṉaikku
melpāṟkellai koḷkiṉṟār Eṉpakkal(k) koṇṭa viḷainilattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai teruvukkutteṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai neṭuvāyaluṭaiyār maṉaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai koḷkiṉṟār Eṉpakkal vilaikoṇṭa viḷainilattukku vaṭakkum Innāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa mikutikkuṟai vuṭpaṭa maṉai kuḻi 3 10 Ikkuḻi muppatum kāliṅkarāyarmaṉai yeṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa maṉaikku melpāṟkellai mutaliyār tirunāmattukkāṇi maṉaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai teruvukkut teṟkum kiḻ
pāṟkellai koḷkiṉṟār Eṉpakkal vilaikoṇṭa viḷainilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Innilattukku vaṭakkum Innāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa mikutikkuṟai vuṭpaṭa maṉai kuḻi 3 10 Ikkuḻi muppatum kuṉṟapperumāḷ maṉaiyirup peṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa maṉaikku melpāṟkellai koḷkiṉṟār Eṉpakkal vilaikoṇṭa viḷainilattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai teruvukkut teṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai nāyiṉār tirumeyññāṉamuṭaiyār tevatāṉa maṉaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai koḷkiṉṟār Eṉpakkal vilaikoṇṭa viḷainilattukku vaṭakkum Innāṉkellairiḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa mikutikkuṟai vuṭpaṭa maṉai kuḻi 2 10 Ik
kuḻi Irupatum pāmpurnāṭṭukkoṉmaṉaiyirup peṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa maṉaikku m[elpāṟkeThe space for this expression is left unengraved on the stone.]llai mutaliyār tirunāmattukkāṇi maṉaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Innāyiṉār tirunāmattukkāṇi viḷainilattukkum koḷkiṉṟār Eṉpakkal vilaikoṇṭa viḷainilattu[kkum teṟThe space for this expression is left unengraved on the stone.]kum kiḻpāṟkellai Innilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai teruvukkum [vaṭakkumThe space for this expression is left unengraved on the stone.]Iṉṉāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa mikutikkuṟai vuṭpaṭa maṉai kuḻi [100 I] kkuḻi nū ṣpace for about five letters is left blank.kāḷikkoṉ maṉaiirup peṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa maṉaikku melpāṟke ṣpace for about five letters is left blank. yār tirunāmattukkāṇi maṉaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai koḷkiṉṟār Eṉ
pakkal vilaikoṇṭa viḷainilattukkut teṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai mutaliyār tiru[nāmattukThe space for this expression is left blank on the stone.] kāṇiviḷainilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai kuḷattukku vaṭakkum Iṉṉāṉke[llaiyuḷ naThe space for this expression is left blank on the stone.]ṭuvuṭpaṭṭa mikutikkuṟai vuṭpaṭa maṉai kuḻi 100 Ikkuḻi nūṟum Ēṭetiriṭṭāṉmaṉai ye[ṉṟu perkūThe space for this expression is left blank on the stone.]vappaṭṭa maṉaikku melpāṟkellai nāyiṉār tirumeññāṉamuṭaiyār kuṭi[niṅkā teThe space for this expression is left blank on the stone.]vatāṉam viḷainilattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai koḷkiṉṟār Eṉpak[kal vilaikThe space for this expression is left blank on the stone.]oṇṭa viḷainilattukkut teṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai mutaliyār tirunāma[ttukkāṇiThe space for this expression is left blank on the stone.] maṉaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai kuḷattukku vaṭakkum IṉṉāṉkeThe inscription is incomplete.—
Digital edition of SII 8.244 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
